tours.name: Combination Tour — Full Bimini Experience
tours.description: Get ready to discover the very best of Bimini in one unforgettable adventure that blends history, culture, natural beauty, island flavors, and breathtaking scenery into a seamless guided experience across both North and South Bimini.
tours.description_extended:
Your journey begins in colorful Alice Town, where the vibrant spirit of island life comes alive through charming streets, local culture, and authentic Bahamian hospitality. Cruise past stunning white-sand beaches and crystal-clear turquoise waters while uncovering the stories, legends, and rich heritage that make Bimini unlike anywhere else in the world.

Along the way, guests may experience iconic highlights such as the famous Dolphin House Museum, Heroes Park, the Bimini Craft Centre, scenic marinas lined with luxury yachts, and panoramic coastal views stretching across the Atlantic. Hear fascinating stories surrounding Ernest Hemingway’s connection to Bimini and the mystery of the legendary Bimini Road, often linked to the Lost City of Atlantis.

The adventure continues with a scenic ferry ride to South Bimini, where guests will experience a quieter and more untouched side of the island. Discover breathtaking shorelines, Shell Beach, the legendary Fountain of Youth area associated with Ponce de León, and the world-renowned Bimini Biological Field Station, known globally for marine research and shark conservation.

Throughout the experience, guests enjoy authentic island storytelling, local food sampling including conch and traditional Bimini bread, scenic photo opportunities, and the warm hospitality that defines the Bahamian experience.

From hidden gems and cultural landmarks to unforgettable ocean views and island traditions, every moment of the Combination Tour is designed to immerse guests in the true essence of Bimini — all in one extraordinary experience.

tours.logistics: We meet all guests at the Resorts World Bimini Casino tram stop. From the pier, take the complimentary tram — it's free, runs continuously, and the Casino stop is the last stop, so just stay on until the end. There is a bridge connecting the pier to town, but walking is not practical in the heat and will eat into your time on island. The tram is the way to go. Please note that cruise ship excursion guests are often given priority disembarkation, so arrival times may vary. We recommend allowing approximately 15–30 minutes from disembarkation to arrival at the meeting location. Your guide will be there to greet you once you arrive.
whats_included: All site admissions listed in the tour

tours.name: South Bimini: Ponce de León Tour
tours.image: images/Ponce de Leon's South Bimini Island Tour.avif
tours.description: South Bimini moves at a different pace — quieter, older, deeper. This two-hour tour takes you to the legendary Fountain of Youth, the pristine sands of Shell Beach, and the world-renowned Bimini Biological Field Station, home to one of the longest-running shark research programs on the planet. Your guide narrates the history and folklore of an island that has drawn explorers and adventurers for centuries.
tours.logistics: We meet all guests at the Resorts World Bimini Casino tram stop. whats_included: All site admissions listed in the tour

tours.name: North Bimini Heritage Tour
tours.description: The most popular tour for good reason — this is Bimini’s living story brought to life. Spend two unforgettable hours exploring the heart of North Bimini on a guided cultural journey through historic landmarks, local traditions, and the island’s most treasured sites.
tours.description_extended:
Travel through colorful communities and scenic coastal roads while discovering the stories, people, and moments that shaped Bimini into one of the Bahamas’ most unique destinations. Visit the famous Dolphin House Museum, experience a live conch demonstration, sample traditional Bimini bread, and hear fascinating tales connected to island life, local legends, Ernest Hemingway, and Bimini’s rich maritime heritage.

From hidden gems and cultural landmarks to breathtaking ocean views and authentic Bahamian hospitality, every stop offers a deeper connection to the soul of the island.

Relaxed, immersive, and genuinely memorable — this is Bimini through the eyes of the people who call it home.

tours.name: Eat Like a Local: Bimini Food Experience Tour
tours.description: This is Bimini beyond the postcard. Spend three unforgettable hours tasting your way through the island’s culinary soul — where every flavor tells a story and every stop offers a deeper connection to authentic Bahamian culture.
tours.description_extended:
Enjoy fresh conch prepared the Bahamian way, warm island bread straight from the source, tropical island drinks, and local flavors that simply cannot be replicated anywhere else. From hidden local favorites to beloved island staples, this experience takes you beyond the tourist areas and into the real heart of Bimini.

Your guide is a Bimini native who knows exactly where the locals eat, gathering places filled with personality, tradition, and generations of history. Along the way, hear stories about island life, fishing culture, Bahamian traditions, and the role food plays in bringing the community together.

No tourist traps. No shortcuts. Just authentic flavors, genuine hospitality, and the true taste of Bimini.

whats_not_included: Additional beverages beyond what is included

tours.name: Bimini Sit-Low Sightseeing
tours.description: Get ready to experience Bimini like never before—without ever leaving your seat. This exhilarating, seamlessly guided tour sweeps you across the island’s most iconic sights, offering a vibrant snapshot of its charm, history, and natural beauty in one unforgettable journey.
tours.description_extended:
Glide past powdery white beaches kissed by turquoise waters, where the Atlantic sparkles in every shade of blue imaginable. Soak in panoramic views of the legendary Bimini Road, steeped in mystery and intrigue, and catch glimpses of the storied shoreline once frequented by Ernest Hemingway himself. As you cruise through Alice Town, feel the heartbeat of island life—colorful buildings, lively streets, and authentic Bahamian spirit all unfolding before you.

Along the way, discover historic landmarks, picturesque marinas dotted with sleek yachts, and serene mangrove habitats teeming with life. Every turn reveals another postcard-worthy scene, every moment a new perspective on this tropical haven.

No stops, no interruptions—just pure, immersive sightseeing in a smooth, continuous ride. Perfect for capturing the essence of Bimini in a fun, relaxed, and visually stunning experience.

tours.name: Guided Golf Cart Tour
tours.image: images/North Bimini Island Golf Cart Tour.avif
tours.description: Two hours on North Bimini the way locals move — by golf cart. Cover more ground, stop at the highlights, and hear the kind of local commentary no guidebook has ever captured. A certified guide leads the way; you just enjoy the ride.

tours.name: Bimini Your Way Private
tours.description: The ultimate high-touch experience. A 100% flexible itinerary built entirely around your interests and group.

tours.name: Bimini Beach Experience
tours.description: Relax on Bimini's pristine sands. We handle the transport and setup so you can simply enjoy the water.

tours.name: Corporate & Large Groups
tours.description: Professional handling for large parties. Includes full coordination, logistics, and optional add-ons.

tours.name: Transportation Services
tours.description: Reliable island transportation for individuals, families, and groups across Bimini. Our fleet and network ensure you never miss a connection.

tours.name: VIP Pickup & Meet and Greet
tours.description: Personalized airport, dock, or hotel meet-and-greet service with priority pickup and assistance. Start your Bimini visit with ease.

tours.name: Destination Management (DMC)
tours.description: Full destination support including tour planning, logistics, group coordination, and on-island arrangements for events and corporate needs.

tours.name: Travel Agent & Cruise Partner Services
tours.description: We work closely with travel agents, cruise lines, and tourism partners to provide customized tour packages, group handling, and seamless shore excursions.
